client.name: Brian Chaggu - Operations Compliance Support
client.label: Operations support, training and quality specialist with payments-support, compliance, SLA, and case-management experience
client.work_authorization: Work authorization status to be confirmed

core_positioning.notes: This profile is for operations support, payments support, training and quality, risk/compliance support, customer operations, and SLA-driven service roles. Best-fit targets include Operations Support Specialist, Quality Analyst, Compliance Support, Risk Operations, Payments Operations, and CRM-driven case-management roles. Keep this separate from Brian's research/international-relations profile so the AI does not blend academic policy work into recruiter-facing operations applications.

summary_base: Operations support and training/quality specialist with 4+ years of experience across payments support, regulatory-compliance support, SLA management, escalation handling, and multi-system case resolution in Poland.

Strongest evidence includes handling 80-120+ client cases daily with 98-100% SLA adherence, reducing repeat escalations by about 20% through root-cause analysis, and sustaining 99%+ data-accuracy standards in booking and payment workflows.

Best positioned for operations support, quality/compliance support, risk operations, CRM-driven case management, and service-delivery roles where structured execution, accuracy, and escalation control matter.

experience.summary: Operations support role covering booking modifications, payment discrepancies, validation, reconciliation, and cross-functional escalation handling in a high-volume service environment.
highlights: **Managed 80-120+ client cases daily** across booking modifications and payment discrepancies while maintaining 98-100% SLA adherence.
**Delivered 99%+ data accuracy and zero-defect processing** through end-to-end validation, reconciliation, and structured case handling.
**Reduced repeat escalations by around 20%** by investigating account and payment irregularities through multi-system data analysis and root-cause identification.
**Resolved high-priority cases with cross-functional teams** across Operations, Compliance, and Partner functions inside defined service timelines.

experience.summary: Quality and compliance-focused role covering audit checks, trend analysis, escalation handling, and SLA/KPI monitoring within the same operating environment.
highlights: **Conducted 50+ monthly quality and compliance audits** and sustained 99% adherence to internal controls and regulatory standards.
**Identified control gaps through trend analysis** and implemented process improvements that reduced rework by 15-25%.
**Handled complex escalations with structured root-cause analysis** and corrective-action planning to reduce repeat issues.
**Monitored SLA performance and quality KPIs** through reporting dashboards that improved on-time resolution visibility.

education.note: GPA 4.87/5.0; Santander Universidades Award for Best International Student (2019/2020)
